2026-04-22.content:
**Preview**: [Cloud Number Registry](https://docs.cloud.google.com/number-registry/overview)
provides IP address management (IPAM) capabilities to let you view, manage, and
plan your IP address usage in Google Cloud.

summary.title: IP Address Management in Google Cloud
summary.summary: Cloud Number Registry offers IP address management (IPAM) capabilities within Google Cloud, allowing users to view, manage, and plan their IP address allocation. This feature helps in efficiently organizing and utilizing IP addresses for various cloud resources.
